items.title: WATCH:  Dogs take on the Winter Games

items.title: Watch Live: Minnesota officials testify at Senate hearing on immigration

items.title: Minneapolis live updates: Minneapolis surge ending, Homan says

items.title: 2 US Navy ships collide in Caribbean, minor injuries reported
items.description: Two U.S. Navy ships collided in the Caribbean on Wednesday resulting in two minor injuries, both ships are continuing to sail safely.

items.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.
